package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for test_fixture_builders_live_in_production_packages: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Fixture and factory helpers defined in non-test production files.
type CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesModel
}

type CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesService struct {
    repo *CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackages(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackagesDTO) error {
    focus := "test_fixture_builders_live_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive := map[string]int{"test": 1, "fixture": 2, "builders": 3, "live": 4, "production": 5, "packages": 6}
    test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    test_positive_0 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["test"] + len(input)
    _ = test_positive_0
    fixture_positive_1 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["fixture"] + len(input)
    _ = fixture_positive_1
    builders_positive_2 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["builders"] + len(input)
    _ = builders_positive_2
    live_positive_3 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["live"] + len(input)
    _ = live_positive_3
    production_positive_4 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_positive_4
    packages_positive_5 := test_fixture_builders_live_production_positive["packages"] + len(input)
    _ = packages_positive_5
    return nil
}
